basic_details.job_title: DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Protection Officer, Community Workers and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu (DCPU Chengalpattu) Protection Officer and Community Workers Notification 2026 has been released on the official website chengalpattu.nic.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Chengalpattu Protection Officer and Community Workers Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 42 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management, Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management with 2 years experience, Graduate in B.A Social Work/Sociology/Social Sciences
qualification.details: Protection Officer (Institutional Care): Post Graduate degree in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University OR Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University with 2 years experience in project formulation/implementation, monitoring and supervision preferably in the field of Women & Child Development/Social Welfare. Proficiency in Computers. SJPU Community Worker: Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work/Sociology/Social Sciences from a recognized university. Weightage for work experience candidate. Proficiency in Computers. Community Worker: Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work/Sociology/Social Sciences from a recognized university. Weightage for work experience candidate. Proficiency in Computers.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Chengalpattu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://chengalpattu.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Chengalpattu Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Chengalpattu Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Protection Officer (Institutional Care): Post Graduate degree in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University OR Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University with 2 years experience in project formulation/implementation, monitoring and supervision preferably in the field of Women & Child Development/Social Welfare. Proficiency in Computers. SJPU Community Worker: Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work/Sociology/Social Sciences from a recognized university. Weightage for work experience candidate. Proficiency in Computers. Community Worker: Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work/Sociology/Social Sciences from a recognized university. Weightage for work experience candidate. Proficiency in Computers.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 42 years.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Chengalpattu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://chengalpattu.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Protection Officer and Community Workers posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Protection Officer and Community Workers posts by the District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Protection Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Protection Officer post, candidates need a Post Graduate degree in relevant fields or a Graduate degree with 2 years of experience. Specific details are in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this recruitment is 42 years. Age relaxation details, if any, will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Community Worker post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Community Worker post is Rs. 18,536 per month. For the Protection Officer post, the salary is Rs. 27,804 per month.

faq.question: Q7. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: The application for the DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 must be submitted in Offline mode. Candidates need to send their filled application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for DCPU Chengalpattu?
faq.answer: The official website for the District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu is http://chengalpattu.nic.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Protection Officer and Community Workers are contractual in nature. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.
